Welcome: I am a <1>Full Stack</1> Developer, Passionate about building innovative digital solutions.
About_Text: Hello, my name is Vitor, I am a full stack developer. I have been working with software development for 3 years, and I found my passion in this field as a technology enthusiast and a lover of learning. I am always excited to keep up with the latest tendencies. At the moment I am based in Brazil, but I spent 8 years of my life travelling the world, which I believe contributed to a better professional personality. This journey helped me acquire many soft skills and real life problem solving ability, which is the best skill a developer can have. As a freelancer I have delivered projects through direct client contact, and also completed 30+ deliveries on Fiverr for international clients. This early in my career put me in a position to deal with and solve real world problems very naturally. I would love to contribute and work together on something remarkable.
I_here_to_help: I'm here to help. Tell me about your project.
name: name
Success: Your email has been sent successfully!
Haute_couture: Built with React, Redux, and Tailwind CSS, this platform offers efficient UI, navigation, and styling. It features user authentication, account creation, login, and React Form Library for streamlined form management. Includes a bag for user selections and a page for order viewing. Firestore-backed for product data, it ensures a mobile-friendly experience, epitomizing modern web development in fashion retail.
Reddit_minimal: A web application for streamlined Reddit browsing, uses HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and the Reddit API. It features a minimalist interface for straightforward access to posts, comments, and media. Designed responsively, it provides a consistent experience on various devices, focusing on efficiency and simplicity in web development.
Jamming: A React web app, simplifies creating Spotify playlists. With a responsive design, it works seamlessly across various devices. Users can search for music and assemble custom playlists. These can be saved to their Spotify accounts using POST and GET requests for streamlined data management.
See_the_website: See the website's mobile view by narrowing your screen!
Herbal_bliss: This project involves developing a website for a tea shop using Next.js, leveraging its server-side rendering capabilities for enhanced performance. TypeScript is integrated to ensure more reliable and maintainable code. The combination of these technologies aims to create a fast, efficient, and user-friendly online experience
